description:
A New Standard for Image Viewers

BandiView is the succeeding image viewer to Honeyview, that inherits everything cool of its predecessor and also gets improved even further. Fast and easy to view images in a variety of formats, from the most common ones to the most professional ones.
- Fixed a bug that occurs when launching the app in a maximized window
- Added a feature to set the colors of the grid background
- Added "Do not save recent folder path" option
- Fixed a bug that occurs when applying ICC profiles in JXL format
- Fixed a bug that the program cannot open some HEIC files
- Fixed a bug that the desktop background does not appear in Windows Personalization if the thumbnail preview for JPG format is enabled in Explorer
- Improved program stability
- Other modifications
